nodes.title: CLIP Text Encode (Positive Prompt)
widgets_values:
Place the character from the first reference image into the environment from the
second reference image as a single believable photograph. Keep the character's face,
hairstyle, body type, and clothing exactly as in the first image. Position them
naturally in the location at correct scale with proper ground contact, [standing
relaxed, looking toward the camera]. Re-light the character to match the environment:
align color temperature, light direction, and shadow softness to the second image,
and add realistic contact shadows where they meet the ground. Preserve the location's
architecture, background detail, and depth. Photorealistic, single consistent
perspective, cohesive lighting, sharp focus, seamless integration, no compositing
seams, no duplicate people.
